svg.title: UML use case diagram for the Patient actor in the brain tumor detection system
svg.desc: Patient actor on the left connected to 13 use cases inside the system boundary, with include and extend relationships shown as dashed arrows. Secondary actors Database and FastAPI on the right.
svg.text: Dashed arrows: \u00ABinclude\u00BB = always invoked, \u00ABextend\u00BB = conditionally invoked
